style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura with jagged edges, casting distorted shadows that stretch unnaturally across the ground. Slow-drifting mist particles swirl in ghostly blue-white tendrils, while faint energy pulses glow through its translucent skin in rhythmic pulses of deep indigo. The eerie purple luminescence casts an unsettling glow on the surrounding air, with distorted reflections shimmering in nearby puddles. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
